spoilers.title: Oda (2018): The reason I avoid depicting people die is that I want to draw a celebration after the battle. If someone dies, you can’t really have a joyful party afterward. To me, a party is the ideal
spoilers.text: Oda (2018): The reason I avoid depicting people die is that I want to draw a celebration after the battle. If someone dies, you can’t really have a joyful party afterward. To me, a party is the ideal expression of friendship. I want One Piece to end with one huge party.😍

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1188 I hope Oda eventually shows us Loki's version of Hakoku/Hakai; with Ragnir, that could turn into an insanely powerful attack. I’d also really love it if Oda highlighted the mechanics behind the attack(just like he did with the background of Ryou back in Wano).

misc.title: Because the MSX2’s mode allowed 16 simultaneous on-screen colors which you could choose from a color palette (unlike the MSX which had a fixed palette), we decided to make the logo look more metallic
misc.text: Because the MSX2’s mode allowed 16 simultaneous on-screen colors which you could choose from a color palette (unlike the MSX which had a fixed palette), we decided to make the logo look more metallic rather than a simple solid color. We also added the metallic sound effect for when the title scrolled up from the bottom of the screen and locked into place. Solit 想律人 (@Marcelllado) メタルギアのロゴには、ちょっと面白い違いがあります。パッケージや説明書、ROMラベル、広告では青を基調としたデザインですが、ゲームのタイトル画面では金属の質感を思わせるオレンジとグレーの配色に変更されています。意図的な演出だったのでしょうか？ ©Konami 1987 — https://nitter.net/Marcelllado/status/2076447640070377503#m

items.title: Because the MSX2’s mode allowed 16 simultaneous on-screen colors which you could choose from a color palette (unlike the MSX which had a fixed palette), we decided to make the logo look more metallic
items.text: Because the MSX2’s mode allowed 16 simultaneous on-screen colors which you could choose from a color palette (unlike the MSX which had a fixed palette), we decided to make the logo look more metallic rather than a simple solid color. We also added the metallic sound effect for when the title scrolled up from the bottom of the screen and locked into place. Solit 想律人 (@Marcelllado) メタルギアのロゴには、ちょっと面白い違いがあります。パッケージや説明書、ROMラベル、広告では青を基調としたデザインですが、ゲームのタイトル画面では金属の質感を思わせるオレンジとグレーの配色に変更されています。意図的な演出だったのでしょうか？ ©Konami 1987 — https://nitter.net/Marcelllado/status/2076447640070377503#m
